profile.name: Dr. Dima Abu Baker
profile.headline: Assistant Professor of Prosthodontics with academic and clinical expertise
profile.bio: I'm Dr. Dima Abu Baker — a prosthodontist with 7+ years of academic and clinical experience. My work spans teaching, research, and specialist clinical care, with a focus on prosthodontic treatment, digital dentistry, implant dentistry, minimally invasive care, biomimetic dentistry, and adhesive dentistry.

_hiring_disabled.title: Open to Collaboration & Hiring
_hiring_disabled.description: I'm actively seeking research collaborators, postdoctoral fellows, and motivated graduate students interested in human-computer interaction, accessibility, and reproducible research methods. If you share a passion for inclusive design and rigorous experimentation, let's build something meaningful together.

_lab_disabled.title: Advanced Systems & Learning Lab
_lab_disabled.description: Our lab focuses on building usable systems, publishing reproducible work, and designing responsibly. We explore the intersection of human-computer interaction, machine learning, and accessibility to solve real-world problems. We prioritize hands-on projects, rigorous experiments, and open-source contributions.

_projects_disabled.title: Assistive UX Toolkit
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Tooling & patterns for inclusive interfaces
_projects_disabled.description: A toolkit for designers & developers to build accessible UI components and test assistive workflows.

_projects_disabled.title: Repro Pipelines
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Workflows for reproducible experiments
_projects_disabled.description: Automated scripts and containerized environments that make experiments reproducible.

_projects_disabled.title: Study Portal
_projects_disabled.subtitle: Participant recruitment & consent
_projects_disabled.description: A secure, privacy-preserving portal to manage research participants and consent forms.

teaching.title: Prosthodontics Laboratory
teaching.description: Hands-on laboratory course covering complete denture fabrication, partial dentures, and prosthodontic techniques. Students develop practical skills through live demonstrations and video-recorded instructions.

teaching.title: Advanced Prosthodontics
teaching.description: Advanced study of prosthodontic principles, including complex cases, implant-supported prostheses, and modern digital impression techniques for palatal defects and challenging anatomies.

teaching.title: Complete Denture Prosthodontics
teaching.description: Comprehensive study of complete denture design, fabrication, and patient management. Covers material selection, including comparisons of acrylic resin versus metal palatal bases.

teaching.title: Clinical Research Methods in Dentistry
teaching.description: Research methodology for dental education and clinical trials. Covers experimental design, randomized controlled trials, patient-reported outcomes, and statistical analysis.

experience.title: Assistant Professor in Prosthodontics
experience.organization: Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry, University of the Pacific
experience.description: Teaching dental students in prosthodontics and dental education, while developing innovative teaching methodologies and conducting research in digital dentistry and prosthodontics education.

experience.title: Assistant Professor in Prosthodontics
experience.organization: School of Dentistry, The University of Jordan
experience.description: Created brand new course offerings for undergraduate and graduate students, designed course materials from learning objectives, developed in-depth lectures, expanded publication activity, collaborated with fellow professors to improve department function and student engagement, and participated in university, community, and professional service activities.

experience.title: Consultant in Prosthodontics
experience.description: Focused on aesthetic minimally invasive dental treatments including injection moulding, composites, partial coverage restorations, and ceramic veneers. Replaced missing teeth with implant-supported prostheses, crowns, bridges, and removable prostheses, developed treatment plans for facial pain and TMDs, and supported functional and aesthetic enhancement for patients with traumatic injuries, diseases, or birth defects.

experience.title: Prosthodontics Resident
experience.description: Mastered advanced techniques in dental prosthetics and restoration, completed over 100 complex cases with high patient satisfaction, collaborated with multidisciplinary teams, and used advanced technology for precise diagnostics and design.

experience.title: Teaching and Research Assistant
experience.organization: Department of Prosthodontics, The University of Jordan
experience.description: Evaluated and graded examinations and assignments, offered feedback to students, taught safe laboratory equipment use and required experiments, and taught undergraduate-level courses.

experience.title: Chief General Dentist
experience.description: Examined oral and maxillofacial structures to diagnose problems and develop treatment plans, improved patients' appearance and self-confidence, educated patients on treatment options and oral health, and collaborated with restorative dentists and orthodontists on comprehensive treatment plans.

education.title: Master's in Clinical Dentistry in Prosthodontics
Doctor of Dental Surgery in Dental Surgery

awards.title: Membership in Prosthodontics
